Who We Are

Exterior Care
Done Right

At Bling Cleaning Services, we transform the outside of your home into something you're proud of. Proudly based in British Columbia, we're the trusted name in professional exterior care — delivering spotless results every single time.

From roofs to driveways, we use professional-grade equipment and eco-friendly solutions to clean safely, efficiently, and thoroughly. Your home deserves to sparkle.

🌿 Eco-Friendly
⚡ Fast & Reliable
🏆 Satisfaction Guarantee
📍 Serving BC

What We Do

Our Services

Five specialized exterior cleaning services designed to restore brilliance to every part of your property.

⭐ Most Popular
🏠
Roof Cleaning
Remove moss, algae, lichen and years of buildup safely. Extends the life of your roof and boosts curb appeal dramatically.
🌊
Gutter Cleaning
Clear blockages, flush downspouts and prevent costly water damage to your foundation and fascia boards.
🚗
Driveway Cleaning
High-pressure washing to blast away oil stains, tire marks and grime — leaving your driveway looking brand new.
✨ Crystal Clear
🪟
Window Cleaning
Streak-free, crystal-clear windows inside and out. Professional tools and techniques for spotless results every time.
🌤️
Patio Cleaning
Restore your outdoor living space. We clean decks, patios, pavers and stonework to revive your backyard retreat.

See Us in Action

Watch the Transformation

Tap a service tab or use the arrows to explore each transformation one at a time.

🚗

Driveway Cleaning

High-pressure washing blasts away years of oil stains, tire marks and grime — leaving your driveway sparkling like new.

🏠

Roof Cleaning

Safely removes moss, algae and dark black streaks to restore your roof's appearance and extend its lifespan.

🪟

Window Cleaning

Streak-free, crystal-clear windows using professional squeegees and eco-friendly solution.

Why Bling

The Bling Difference

⚡

Same-Week Service

We respect your time. Book today and we'll have your property gleaming within the week — guaranteed.

🌿

Eco-Friendly Methods

Our biodegradable cleaning solutions are safe for your family, pets, plants and the Canadian environment.

📍

Local BC Experts

We know British Columbia's climate — rain, moss, and mildew included. Our methods are built for BC homes specifically.

💰

Transparent Pricing

No surprises, no hidden fees. Get a clear, upfront quote before we start any work on your property.

🏆

Satisfaction Guarantee

Not happy with the results? We'll come back and make it right — no questions, no excuses.

📱

Easy Booking

Book online or call us directly. Flexible scheduling to fit your busy lifestyle — including weekends.
